category_sources: source_facts.description says msitools is a Windows installer MSI tool; official GNOME wiki says it inspects and builds Windows Installer files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is msitools; official GNOME wiki heading is msitools.
docs_sources: Official GNOME wiki page includes a Documentation section linking CreateMSI and CreateLibraryWxi how-to pages.
repo_sources: Official GNOME wiki Contribute section lists https://gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/msitools as the project repository.
tags_sources: Official GNOME wiki describes inspecting/building MSI files and lists tools such as msiinfo, msibuild, msiextract, msidump, msidiff, wixl, and wixl-heat.
